title: Non-record: BESE Novel Tokenizer — 38-Token Structured Alphabet + BPE, 288 Vocab, 12.9MB
author: mrbese

data.description: Tokenizer-level vocabulary reduction to 288 tokens to save embedding parameters and reallocate budget to model depth.
Novel two-layer tokenizer: a 38-token structured alphabet followed by BPE trained on the structured token stream.

novel_contributions: Introduces BESE, a two-layer tokenizer with a 38-token structured alphabet plus 250 BPE merges.
Reduces vocabulary from 1,024 to 288 tokens to save embedding parameters.
Uses frequency-based letter grouping and context-disambiguated token groups.
Applies BPE on structured tokens rather than raw bytes.
Provides explicit byte accounting to preserve exact UTF-8 byte counts for BPB scoring.
Claims model-size reduction to 12.9MB while maintaining byte-accurate tokenization.
